stories.title: Djokovic Breaks Federer's Record — 106 Wimbledon Wins, Into QF

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text: Novak Djokovic def. Safiullin to win his 106th Wimbledon match — sole all-time record, passing Federer's 105. At 39, he called it "ugly" but got it done. Into the quarterfinals. #Wimbledon #Djokovic #Tennis #TennisFanrecap

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text: Djokovic on win No. 106 at Wimbledon: "A win is a win, even if you win ugly." 39 years old. 17th Wimbledon quarterfinal. The man is relentless. Next: FAA in the QF. #Wimbledon #Djokovic #Tennis #TennisFanrecap

article.headline: Djokovic Makes History With 106th Wimbledon Win, Surpassing Federer's All-Time Record

stories.title: Osaka Stuns World No. 1 Sabalenka 6-2, 7-6(2) — First Wimbledon Quarterfinal

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text: Naomi Osaka 6-2, 7-6(2) over No. 1 Sabalenka. First Wimbledon quarterfinal of her career. First win over Sabalenka in 8 years. She also ended Sabalenka's 21-match Grand Slam tiebreak winning streak. Osaka is ON GRASS. #Wimbledon #Osaka #Tennis #TennisFanrecap

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text: Osaka is 8-1 on grass in 2026. She was 0-13 vs top-10 players on non-hard courts coming in. Yesterday she beat the world No. 1 in straight sets at Wimbledon. What a run. #Wimbledon #Osaka #WTA #TennisFanrecap

stories.title: Day 8 Round-Up: Zverev and Dimitrov Advance; Struff Makes History at 36

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text: Day 8 at Wimbledon: Zverev into QF. Dimitrov advances. And from Day 7 — Jan-Lennard Struff, age 36, reached his FIRST career Grand Slam quarterfinal on his 47th attempt. Hurkacz retired with a back injury. #Wimbledon #Tennis #TennisFanrecap

stories.title: Wimbledon QF Preview — Sinner vs Struff, FAA vs Djokovic Headlines Men's Draw

x_posts.label: Post 4-1
x_posts.text: Wimbledon men's QF draw: No. 1 Sinner (0 sets dropped) vs Struff. No. 3 FAA vs No. 7 Djokovic (106 Wimbledon wins). Two huge matchups. Youth vs. experience. The record-holder vs the contender. #Wimbledon #Tennis #TennisFanrecap

x_posts.label: Post 4-2
x_posts.text: FAA vs Djokovic at Wimbledon. One has 24 Grand Slam titles. The other has zero — and wants his first. This is the quarterfinal match everyone wanted. #Wimbledon #Djokovic #FAA #TennisFanrecap

stories.title: Women's QF Outlook — Osaka, Gauff-Pegula, and the Eala Question

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text: Women's Wimbledon QF update: Osaka in. Gauff vs Pegula (all-American). Muchova in. Eala vs Paolini still deciding. The No. 1 and No. 2 seeds are both gone. Anyone can win this. #Wimbledon #WTA #Tennis #TennisFanrecap
